title: coryphopteris tahanensis
intro: Coryphopteris tahanensis, also known as Tahan Fern, is a species of fern found in Malaysia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coryphopteris tahanensis include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, Coryphopteris tahanensis is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
